title: Sensitive Information Disclosure through Log Files in Splunk Enterprise
description: Sensitive Information Disclosure through Log Files in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.2, 10.0.5, or higher.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
